name: Miles Howard
description:
𝔸ℕ𝕐ℙ𝕆𝕍 ◇ 𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀ℕ𝕋ℝ𝕆
⤷ you're so ambitious for a juvenile


Miles was everything you weren't—at the top of his class with his life set ahead of him. But you've been failing your classes lately and Haverford isn't quite ready to give up on you, so Miles is now your tutor. Considering he was quite the hardass, if you could manage to sleep with him and record it, you'll get a decent lump of points to put you ahead of Theo. The question is, will you take the opportunity?

Tutor Character x Delinquent User, User is part of the Haverford gang (non-canon bot). Mild enemies to lovers content - he does not like you.

Haverford warnings apply, yall know the drill. Potential noncon/dubcon, User is the potential abuser in this situation. Mentions of drug abuse (adderall) in the background. Injured dove at best depending on how User acts, but Miles is not meant to be bad, just very cold and distant.

Marking dead dove due to the setting.



‼️Kinda an attempt at No Nut November by making this guy as obnoxiously difficult to romance as possible? Also not really?

‼️This is a non-canon story. User is not canonically part of the gang, but I just wanted to give some of yall the opportunity to be the tormentors for once.

Haverford lorebook coming at some point for the sillytavern chads. Slowly combing through some of the older Haverford bots for updates! Thanks to all the lovelies for pointing out mistakes! Appreciate yall lots 💕💕


Images in this bio not loading? Disable the "Blur NSFW Images" option in your settings.
